data.content: Approved implementation review on commit c98c9c45. Verified the lightbox title editor now sits in a flex-1 header region while the Close button is shrink-0, so editing can use the remaining header width without overlapping or pushing the button. Verified the editing input is borderless and chrome-free via transparent background, zero border, zero padding, and no focus ring, matching the seamless inline-label editing requirement. Confirmed scope is limited to the lightbox header/title editor and a regression test. Re-ran validation in /Users/cartine/foolery-6a0d: bun run lint (passes with one pre-existing warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx about react-hooks/incompatible-library), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.
